title: From The Mountain.
content:
If I, dearest Lily, did not love thee,

    How this prospect would enchant my sight!
    And yet if I, Lily, did not love thee,

    Could I find, or here, or there, delight?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "From The Mountain."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
